modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help with PivotTable Chart formatting in Excel

full_description_text: I was trying to make a chart. The PivotTable is not looking right. I don’t know how to fix it. Excel is confusing sometimes.
short_description: Need help with PivotTable Chart formatting in Excel
description: I was trying to make a chart. The PivotTable is not looking right. I don’t know how to fix it. Excel is confusing sometimes.
